title: AI Customer Churn Predictor (Python, Streamlit, Scikit-learn, Groq AI)
description: AI-powered customer churn prediction tool using Random Forest ML and Groq/Llama 3.3 AI. Predicts which customers are at risk of leaving and explains WHY in plain business English. Features single customer prediction with gauge chart, batch CSV upload for 7,043+ customers, AI retention analysis, board-ready AI executive summary, risk segmentation (High/Medium/Low), and downloadable results. Model accuracy 76.4% trained on IBM Telco dataset. Live on Streamlit Cloud.

title: AI Data Quality Agent (Python, Streamlit, Groq AI)
description: AI-powered data quality auditing tool that automatically profiles any CSV or Excel dataset, detects anomalies, scores data quality from 0 to 100, and generates a professional AI-powered PDF report. Features include outlier detection using IQR method, duplicate and missing value analysis, colour-coded issue severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low), interactive Plotly visualisations, and Groq/Llama 3.3 AI narrative with Executive Summary, Key Findings and Recommendations. Tested on IBM HR Analytics dataset (1,470 records). Live on Streamlit Cloud.

title: AI-Powered Water Infrastructure Risk Mapper (Python, Streamlit, QGIS, Groq AI)
description: AI-powered GIS tool for water infrastructure asset risk analysis — replicating the Asset Intelligence workflow used by water utility companies like Severn Trent. Maps 200 assets across the Midlands using QGIS and Folium, scores risk by age, condition and inspection history, generates AI zone risk reports and individual asset inspection reports in plain English, and produces professional 5-page PDF reports with charts and QGIS spatial maps. Built with Python, Streamlit, QGIS, Folium, Plotly, Matplotlib, FPDF2 and Groq/Llama 3.3 AI. Live on Streamlit Cloud.

title: InsightPilot AI (Python, Streamlit, Groq AI)
description: AI-powered business analyst agent that lets you upload any CSV dataset and ask business questions in plain English. Groq/Llama 3.3 AI automatically generates and executes real pandas code, returning instant business insights. Features include CSV upload, automatic data profiling, KPI detection, SQL Playground powered by DuckDB, and AI-powered Q&A. Tested on IBM HR Analytics dataset (1,470 employee records). Live on GitHub.

title: Retail Cloud Pipeline (Python, BigQuery, SQL, Looker Studio)
description: End-to-end cloud data pipeline built using Python ETL, Google BigQuery, and Looker Studio. Cleaned and transformed 9,994 retail records, wrote 6 BigQuery SQL analysis queries, and built an interactive 2-page dashboard tracking £2.3M in sales performance. Extended with Facebook Prophet ML model generating 12-month sales forecasts with confidence intervals. Live on GitHub.

title: NLP to SQL Query Tool (Python, Gemini AI, SQLite)
description: AI-powered tool that converts plain English questions into SQL queries automatically. User asks a question, Google Gemini AI generates and executes the SQL on a SQLite database, and returns the answer as a natural language insight. Tested on 9,271 E-Commerce records.

title: AI-Powered Data Insight Generator (Python, Gemini AI)
description: Automated business insight generator that uses Google Gemini AI to analyse any CSV dataset and produce a professional PDF report instantly. Python pipeline loads and analyses data, Gemini AI generates executive summary, key findings, and business recommendations automatically. Tested on IBM HR Analytics dataset (1,470 employee records).

title: GlowHive Product Analytics Dashboard (Looker Studio)
description: Interactive Product Analytics dashboard built in Looker Studio to analyse user growth, subscription performance, revenue trends, customer churn, acquisition channels, and device usage behaviour. Provides KPI monitoring, trend analysis, monetisation insights, and business intelligence reporting using simulated SaaS product data.

title: Supply Chain Analysis (Power BI)
description: Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing supply chain performance across transportation modes, routes, carriers, and product categories to identify cost drivers and revenue opportunities. Built using DAX and Power Query with drill-through capabilities.

title: Super Store Sales Analysis (Power BI)
description: Power BI sales and profit analysis using the Superstore dataset to explore performance across categories, sub-categories, states, cities, and customer segments. Built with DAX measures and interactive slicers.

title: ShopLinx Multi-Channel Sales Analytics (Tableau + Azure)
description: End-to-end Business Intelligence project analyzing Online and Offline retail performance using Tableau. Provides revenue trends, sales distribution by country, product category insights, and KPI tracking. Includes a simulated Azure data pipeline using Python for scalable analytics architecture.

title: Bank Marketing EDA (R)
description: Exploratory Data Analysis on bank telemarketing data using conversion rate KPI. Identified high-performing customer segments and campaign timing patterns, and provided actionable marketing recommendations.

title: Dynamic Pricing Engine with CLV Prediction
description: Machine learning-based dynamic pricing engine integrating CLV predictions to personalise prices for online retail. Used Python and XGBoost to optimise revenue, retention, and customer satisfaction.

title: Monday Coffee SQL Sales Analysis
description: Complete SQL data analysis pipeline for a coffee-chain business. Imported and cleaned transactional data using MySQL, built relational schemas, created analytical views for KPIs, and derived actionable insights for city, product, and customer performance.

title: Crime & Deprivation Mapping (QGIS)
description: Analyzed the correlation between crime rates and socioeconomic deprivation in Cardiff and Swansea using QGIS. Applied spatial techniques including overlay and buffer analysis to identify high-crime, low-income areas and support targeted policy intervention.

title: House Data Dashboard (Tableau)
description: Tableau dashboard analyzing housing market trends including price distribution, property features, location insights, and sales patterns to uncover key real estate insights.

title: Job Data Dashboard (Tableau)
description: Interactive Tableau dashboard analyzing job market data, salary trends, industry demand, and role-based comparisons to provide insights into employment patterns.

title: GIS Mapping: National Parks & COVID-19
description: Created a general-purpose map of Wales highlighting national parks and a statistical map showing COVID-19 case rates per 100k across Indian states using QGIS. Visualized population-normalized data to support public health and educational analysis.

title: Face Recognition Attendance System
description: Developed a face recognition attendance system using Python, OpenCV, DeepFace, and SQLite. Features real-time authentication, GUI via Tkinter, and admin control. Achieved 95% accuracy with secure and efficient attendance logging.

title: EDA & Big Data Strategy with R
description: Conducted EDA on car price data using R and tidyverse for cleaning, visualization, and statistical analysis. Proposed scalable big data solutions integrating R with Apache Spark and cloud storage for efficient analysis.

title: Weather Prediction using Machine Learning
description: Built a machine learning model to predict weather conditions using historical data. Performed data preprocessing, exploratory data analysis, feature selection, and model evaluation to generate accurate forecasts.

title: Wine Quality Prediction
description: Developed classification models to predict wine quality based on physicochemical properties. Compared Random Forest and SVM models and optimized performance using GridSearchCV.

title: Operations Performance Dashboard (Excel)
description: Developed an interactive Excel dashboard to track and analyze key operations KPIs including Revenue, Profit, Orders, and Profit Margin. Includes trend analysis, category breakdowns, and interactive slicers.

title: Python Projects Collection
description: A collection of beginner-friendly Python programs including a calculator, application form, and zodiac sign predictor. These projects demonstrate core Python concepts such as user input handling, conditional logic, and basic program structure.
